overall.description: Game engine footage from a third-person perspective following a large eagle flying through a mountainous wilderness. The bird navigates rocky river canyons, soars over dense pine forests, crosses a wooden railway bridge, and flies toward a tunnel entrance before emerging over open grassland. Bright midday sun illuminates the detailed natural landscape with snow-capped peaks visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky river canyon with steep cliff walls

events.description: eagle begins ascending from canyon floor toward the opening

agents.ego_description: eagle flying through narrow canyon with wings spread, gradually gaining altitude between rocky walls

entered.detail: steep gray rock faces flanking both sides of the canyon
winding river flowing through the canyon bottom with visible rapids
tall rocky summit visible through the canyon exit
green conifers growing sparsely on canyon slopes

segments.scene_description: The eagle navigates a narrow river canyon with steep rock walls rising on both sides. The river flows below as the bird ascends gradually toward the canyon opening where distant mountains are visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: forested mountain slope with large rock formations

events.description: exits narrow canyon into open mountainous terrain with dense forest cover
eagle banks sharply to navigate around large rock outcrop

agents.ego_description: eagle soaring and banking through forested valleys, navigating around rocky outcrops and cliff faces

entered.detail: thick evergreen trees covering the mountain slopes below
massive layered stone formation jutting from the mountainside
distant mountain range with white snow visible on peaks

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the canyon, the eagle soars over dense pine forests covering the mountain slopes. The bird navigates around large rocky outcrops while distant snow-capped mountains become visible on the horizon.

scene_state.functional_zone: railway bridge crossing deep rocky gorge

events.description: approaching wooden railway bridge spanning the deep canyon
eagle descends to follow the railway track line along the cliff edge

agents.ego_description: eagle gliding low over the railway bridge and following the tracks as they curve along the cliff edge toward a tunnel

entered.detail: wooden trestle bridge with metal support structure spanning the gorge
single set of train tracks running along the mountain edge
white water waterfall cascading down the rocky cliff face

segments.scene_description: The eagle approaches and crosses a wooden railway bridge spanning a deep gorge with a waterfall visible on the cliffside. The bird follows the railway tracks as they curve along the mountain toward a dark tunnel entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: open grassland plateau with railway tunnel

events.description: approaching dark railway tunnel entrance carved into the rock face
eagle pulls up sharply to fly over the tunnel entrance into open grassland

agents.ego_description: eagle flying low over tracks then ascending over the tunnel entrance, transitioning to soaring above open meadow

entered.detail: dark arched tunnel entrance carved into the rock face
wide grassy plateau with scattered boulders and sparse vegetation
small circular water pool reflecting the sky

segments.scene_description: The eagle approaches the railway tunnel entrance carved into the rock, then pulls up to fly over it, emerging into a wide open grassland. A small pond is visible below as the bird soars over the expansive meadow with distant mountains in the background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as an eagle ascends from a confined river canyon into a vast, open mountain wilderness. It begins by navigating between steep rock walls above a flowing river, gradually climbing toward the canyon's mouth where the horizon first opens. As the bird emerges, the scene shifts to a sweeping flight over dense pine forests and rocky outcrops, with snow-capped peaks appearing in the distance. The camera then follows the eagle as it crosses a wooden railway bridge over a deep gorge with a waterfall, tracking the curve of the tracks toward a dark tunnel entrance. Finally, the bird pulls up to soar over the tunnel, transitioning from the rocky cliffs into an expansive grassland featuring a small pond and distant mountains under a bright sky.
